name: Maximilian
lore: "A beloved hero who gave up fighting to become a blacksmith. The coming of The Corruption forced him to take up arms once more."
passives: Forges gain 2 uses. When you forge an item, restore 10% of your health.
The first time you would die, prevent it and restore all your health.

name: Liz
lore: "A legendary thief wanted in several countries. Surprisingly, she accepted without hesitation when asked to help fight the Corruption."
passives: One time per Area, when you trash an item, obtain another random one.
The Raccoon gives you an extra potion.
Items in Boss Chests are upgraded.

name: The Shadow
lore: "Once a normal person, they lost all their memories after being transformed by the Corruption. Now, their sole goal is to fight it."
passives: Equipment slots can hold items with a larger variety of Categories.
Golden Chests found in Chest Areas contain rarer items.
Shrines in the Path to the Core are more powerful.
